dsl_rule.translation_notes: Interpreted 'innermost horizontal lines' as Bollinger Band upper/lower bands (slightly overbought/oversold thresholds). Center horizontal line mapped to bb_middle (mean). Entry conditions use band crossovers; exit conditions trigger when price returns to the mean line. Context-dependent direction supports both long (oversold buys) and short (overbought sells) entries based on which band is crossed.

backtest_rule.reason: Interpreted 'innermost horizontal lines' as Bollinger Band upper/lower bands (slightly overbought/oversold thresholds). Center horizontal line mapped to bb_middle (mean). Entry conditions use band crossovers; exit conditions trigger when price returns to the mean line. Context-dependent direction supports both long (oversold buys) and short (overbought sells) entries based on which band is crossed.

source_rule_text: Buy when prices cross the innermost horizontal lines on the slightly oversold side, and sell when prices cross the innermost horizontal lines on the slightly overbought side; take profits when prices return to the mean (center horizontal line).
